overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a stealth action game showing a character in a long coat walking through a foggy, dystopian Victorian city street. The environment features blood-stained cobblestones, military sandbag barricades, and gothic architecture under sickly green fog with street lamp illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy cobblestone street with military barricades and blood stains

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the foggy street toward the sandbag barricade and the guard ahead

notable_agents.action: standing guard near a fire barrel behind sandbag barricades, facing the street

entered.detail: large dark stone cathedral with pointed spires visible through the green fog
stacked military sandbags forming a defensive wall along the left side of the street
tall iron street lamp casting warm orange light through the fog
decorative black iron fence running along the right sidewalk
wet cobblestone pavement with prominent red blood stains scattered across the surface

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a foggy, gas-lit street in a gothic city. Military sandbags line the left side where a guard stands near a fire, while an iron fence runs along the right. The cobblestones are stained with blood, and massive cathedral spires loom in the foggy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: military checkpoint with sandbag barricades and burning barrel

events.description: character slows walking pace while approaching the guard at the barricade

agents.ego_description: slowing down while approaching the armed guard standing by the fire barrel

notable_agents.action: standing alert with weapon near the burning barrel, watching the approaching character

entered.detail: metal barrel with bright orange flames providing warmth and light near the guard
wooden supply crate placed on the sandbags near the barricade

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the military checkpoint, coming within close proximity to the guard standing by a burning barrel. The sandbag barricade now fills the left foreground while the street lamp passes by on the right. The iron fence disappears behind as the character focuses on the armed NPC ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate gothic street that narrows into a tense encounter at a military checkpoint. It begins with the character walking down a gas-lit road where blood-stained cobblestones are flanked by an iron fence and distant, looming cathedral spires. As the character advances, the perspective shifts to bring the military sandbags on the left into sharper focus while the street lamps pass by on the right. The scene then tightens as the iron fence recedes, drawing the camera closer to a guard standing beside a burning barrel. Finally, the environment closes in around the character, centering the view on the armed NPC and the barricade filling the foreground.
